CLASSIFIED

Press Escape, Space, or Enter to skip

CLASSIFIED
CONFIDENTIAL

the dame walked into my office with a name on a slip of paper. d'agnelli. italian by birth, london by choice. fifteen years in the game — the kind of career you don't just stumble into. started as a code jockey in milan, made his way through dublin and london. now runs a $15m operation at c3 ai with 70 people under him.

his last mark? a swiss manufacturer. 100 plants. 2,000 end users. $18m ebit impact. the client kept smiling — nps above 70. that's not just good. that's the kind of number that makes you wonder what he's got on them.

but here's the twist: the subject moonlights. msc in ethical hacking. gchq-certified. the kind of guy who builds the vault by day and picks the lock by night. case remains open.

[contact] [github] [linkedin]
